_meta.note: All paths verified by direct filesystem scan. ZIP contents inspected without extraction.

ui-ux-pro-max-skill-main.author: nextlevelbuilder
ui-ux-pro-max-skill-main.description: Claude Code plugin — 67 UI styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 charts, 15 framework stacks
ui-ux-pro-max-skill-main.installCommand: Extract ZIP then copy ui-ux-pro-max-skill-main/.claude/ into your project root. Skills activate automatically in Claude Code.
ui-ux-pro-max-skill-main.integrationNote: Claude Code plugin format. Extract and merge .claude/ folder into project. Or use: npx skills add <path> if the skills CLI supports local paths.

21st-sdk-main.description: 21st.dev SDK — monorepo for building, deploying, and embedding 21st Agents. Packages: agent, react, node, nextjs, python-sdk, cli, ui, sandbox-provider.
21st-sdk-main.integrationNote: For individual components without full SDK: npx shadcn@latest add https://21st.dev/r/<component>

quant-ux-master.description: Open-source UX research and prototyping tool — usability testing, heatmaps, interaction analytics. Vue.js frontend.
quant-ux-master.runCommand: npm run serve  OR  docker-compose up

nano-banana-2-ai-main.description: Next.js frontend for Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image model — 4K text-to-image, 5-character consistency.

nano-banana-pro-main.description: Reference documentation for Gemini 2.5 Pro Image generation — 2K/4K upscaling, 95% character consistency. No runnable code.
nano-banana-pro-main.integrationNote: Extract README.md as reference documentation. Use nano-banana-2-ai-main for the executable version.

awesome-gpt-image-2-api-and-prompts-main.description: 911 curated prompts for GPT Image 2 API. Includes cases/ folder with examples. CC0 license. Multi-language READMEs (EN/ES/PT/JA/KO/DE/FR/TR/ZH/RU).
awesome-gpt-image-2-api-and-prompts-main.installCommand: Extract ZIP — reference library only, no install needed

open-webui-main.description: Self-hosted AI chat interface for any LLM. Python backend + SvelteKit frontend. Supports Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
open-webui-main.installCommand: docker run -d -p 3000:8080 ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main  OR  cd C:\EMOVEL\04_AI_STACK\open-webui-main && npm install && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
open-webui-main.integrationNote: Docker is the recommended path. Multiple docker-compose variants included for GPU, API-only, data, OTEL configurations.

penpot-develop.description: Open-source Figma alternative. Clojure backend, ClojureScript frontend. Self-hosted via Docker.
penpot-develop.installCommand: NEEDS_MANUAL_SETUP — Clojure dev environment required. Docker recommended: docker-compose -f docker/images/docker-compose.yaml up
penpot-develop.integrationNote: Complex multi-container stack. Use docker-compose.yaml for production-equivalent local setup.

cap-main.description: Open-source Loom alternative — screen recording with shareable links. Has .claude folder indicating Claude Code integration.
cap-main.runCommand: npm run build:web  then  npm run build

screenity-master.description: Browser extension for annotated screen capture. Chrome extension — build produces unpacked extension folder.
screenity-master.installCommand: cd C:\EMOVEL\04_AI_STACK\screenity-master && npm install && npm run build
screenity-master.runCommand: Load unpacked extension in Chrome from build output folder

opencut-main.description: Open-source video editor for short-form content. Monorepo with apps/ structure.

n8n-master.description: Workflow automation platform — n8n source. Monorepo with packages/@n8n/*. Has .agents/skills/ folder for Claude Code agent integration.
n8n-master.installCommand: NEEDS_MANUAL_SETUP — full monorepo. Easier: npx n8n@2.27.0  OR  docker run -it --rm -p 5678:5678 n8nio/n8n
n8n-master.runCommand: npx n8n  OR  docker run -p 5678:5678 n8nio/n8n
n8n-master.integrationNote: Source repo for reference. Preferred runtime is Docker or npx — do not build from source unless modifying n8n core.

claude-council-main.description: Claude Code skill — structured multi-perspective decision review. 5 LLM advisors, peer review, forced debate, dual-chairman synthesis with dissent preservation.
claude-council-main.installCommand: Extract and copy skills/ folder to project root, or use: npx skills add <path>
claude-council-main.integrationNote: Invoke via Claude Code /claude-council skill command. Ref: skills/claude-council/SKILL.md for usage.

claude-cowork.description: Project coordination layer — not found in any searched location.
claude-cowork.integrationNote: Not found in Downloads, Desktop, or C:\EMOVEL. Locate or clone before registering.

gpt-pilot-main.description: Autonomous app builder (Pythagora). Extracted on Desktop. Python env missing pydantic.

reflex-main.description: Python-native reactive UI builder. Extracted on Desktop. reflex not in PATH.
